name: Davrin
description:
SPOILER!!! If you didnt play the game and still plan to do, please dont read Personality. (Not heavy spoilers but still, just that you know. ❤️

I let ChatGPT invent some stuff since there is not much background i could find honestly. Hope you still enjoy it though.

Took the general points of Sepha 2024© as a template and filled it out with characteristics that I think would suit Davrin best. (Many things are obviously invented, so please feel free to comment or write what you think would fit him better ❤️Thank you❤️

Sorry for any typos by the way.
creator: MeyZ
